name: Light air
landDescription: Smoke drifts, barely felt on face

name: Light breeze
landDescription: Leaves rustle, feel wind on face

name: Gentle breeze
landDescription: Leaves and small twigs move, flags extend
seaDescription: Large wavelets, crests begin to break

name: Moderate breeze
landDescription: Small branches move, raises dust and paper

name: Fresh breeze
landDescription: Small trees sway, whitecaps on lakes

name: Near gale
landDescription: Whole trees sway, hard to walk against wind
seaDescription: Sea heaps up, foam blown in streaks

name: Gale
landDescription: Twigs break off trees, very hard to walk
seaDescription: Moderately high waves, crests break into spindrift

name: Strong gale
seaDescription: High waves, dense foam, spray reduces visibility

name: Storm
seaDescription: Very high waves, sea white with foam, visibility poor

name: Violent storm
seaDescription: Exceptionally high waves, visibility severely impaired

name: Hurricane
seaDescription: Air filled with spray, sea completely white
